texto: An opportunity lost may have motivated us to find a satisfying alternative. Adversity or suffering may have taught us certain important skills. Some writers have felt new appreciation for their lives after surviving a serious illness or disability. A fortunate outcome does not invalidate the unfortunate aspect.
explicacao: Citação de Nan Merrick Phifer sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “An opportunity lost may have motivated us to find a satisfying alternative.
